curvepoint cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists rating cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists rulename cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists trade cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table bidlist (ask numeric(12,2), ask_quantity numeric(12,2), bid numeric(12,2), bid_list_id integer generated by default as identity, bid_quantity numeric(12,2) not null, bid_list_date timestamp(6), creation_date timestamp(6), revision_date timestamp(6), status varchar(10), account varchar(30) not null, type varchar(30) not null, benchmark varchar(125), book varchar(125), commentary varchar(125), creation_name varchar(125), deal_name varchar(125), deal_type varchar(125), revision_name varchar(125), security varchar(125), side varchar(125), source_list_id varchar(125), trader varchar(125), primary key (bid_list_id)) Hibernate: create table curvepoint (curve_id integer not null, curve_value numeric(12,2) not null, id integer generated by default as identity, term numeric(12,2) not null, as_of_date timestamp(6), creation_date timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table rating (id integer generated by default as identity, order_number integer not null, fitch_rating varchar(125) not null, moodys_rating varchar(125) not null, sandprating varchar(125) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table rulename (id integer generated by default as identity, description varchar(125) not null, json varchar(125) not null, name varchar(125) not null, sql_part varchar(125) not null, sql_str varchar(125) not null, template varchar(512) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table trade (buy_price numeric(12,2), buy_quantity numeric(12,2) not null, sell_price numeric(12,2), sell_quantity numeric(12,2), trade_id integer generated by default as identity, creation_date timestamp(6), revision_date timestamp(6), trade_date timestamp(6), status varchar(10), account varchar(30) not null, type varchar(30) not null, benchmark varchar(125), book varchar(125), creation_name varchar(125), deal_name varchar(125), deal_type varchar(125), revision_name varchar(125), security varchar(125), side varchar(125), source_list_id varchar(125), trader varchar(125), primary key (trade_id)) Hibernate: create table users (id integer generated by default as identity, fullname varchar(125) not null, password varchar(125) not null, role varchar(125) not null, username varchar(125) not null unique, primary key (id)) 2026-04-10T17:07:26.614+02:00 INFO 137839 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-10T17:07:26.736+02:00 WARN 137839 --- [ main] testcase.name: shouldReturnFormWithErrorIfBindingFails
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (fullname,password,role,username,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into rulename (description,json,name,sql_part,sql_str,template,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) 2026-04-10T17:07:28.053+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Created HttpSession as SecurityContext is non-default 2026-04-10T17:07:28.053+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Stored SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] to HttpSession [org.springframework.mock.web.MockHttpSession@25bf1fe7] 2026-04-10T17:07:28.053+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing POST /ruleName/validate 2026-04-10T17:07:28.054+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Retrieved SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] 2026-04-10T17:07:28.054+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured POST /ruleName/validate

testcase.name: shouldDeleteRuleName
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (fullname,password,role,username,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into rulename (description,json,name,sql_part,sql_str,template,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,default) 2026-04-10T17:07:28.080+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Created HttpSession as SecurityContext is non-default 2026-04-10T17:07:28.080+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Stored SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] to HttpSession [org.springframework.mock.web.MockHttpSession@5f861587] 2026-04-10T17:07:28.080+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /ruleName/delete/10 2026-04-10T17:07:28.080+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] w.c.HttpSessionSecurityContextRepository : Retrieved SecurityContextImpl [Authentication=UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken [Principal=org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User [Username=user, Password=[PROTECTED], Enabled=true, AccountNonExpired=true, CredentialsNonExpired=true, AccountNonLocked=true, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]], Credentials=[PROTECTED], Authenticated=true, Details=null, Granted Authorities=[ROLE_USER]]] 2026-04-10T17:07:28.081+02:00 DEBUG 137839 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured GET /ruleName/delete/10 Hibernate: select count(*) from rulename rn1_0 where rn1_0.id=?

testcase.name: shouldRedirectToListIfExceptionThrown

testcase.name: shouldReturnAddRuleForm
